acceptedAnswer.text: Safety-led planning. Clear boundaries. Plan B when conditions change.
Private tours only. Your own vehicle. Your own pace (within safety limits). No mixed groups by default.
All-inclusive by default. Clear inclusions. Fewer surprise costs. Transparent pricing, written rules.
A health certificate is mandatory for every Ijen guest — screening included and coordinated by JVTO. Real screening, clear rules.
Proof you can verify — licenses, partners, press, and documented references. Trust stack, not slogans.
Reviews as a registry, not a quote wall. Check patterns across platforms.
Meet the people behind your trip — with proof from reviews. Team profiles linked to real guest language.
Partners for context: competence, sustainability, and verification. Not logos — real functions.
Press and recognition, explained with context. Third-party references you can evaluate.
